title: Pop Summer Banger
summary: 118 BPM bright pop instrumental - plucky synth lead, sunny chord progression, festival drop.
prompt: A bright modern pop instrumental at 118 BPM. Plucky tropical-house synth lead in a major key, snappy clap on 2 and 4, punchy electronic kick, sunny progression with airy chord stabs, infectious post-chorus drop with stuttered vocal chops. Bright radio-pop production vibe - perfect for a sunset beach scene.
